# Spray Foam Insulation Miami

> Miami's #1 rated spray foam insulation contractor. Residential and commercial spray foam installation across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach — cutting cooling bills up to 50%, controlling South Florida humidity, and reinforcing homes against hurricane and flood-zone moisture. Free estimates, same-day response, SPFA-certified crews, serving Miami since 2008.

Spray Foam Insulation Miami installs high-performance spray polyurethane foam (SPF) insulation for homeowners and businesses across South Florida. We apply open-cell and closed-cell spray foam to attics and roof decks, interior and exterior wall cavities, crawl spaces, metal buildings, and whole-home and commercial envelopes — engineering each assembly for Miami's heat, humidity, and hurricane exposure.

The core benefits for South Florida properties: a continuous air seal that blocks the convective heat gain driving AC loads (typically 30–50% lower cooling bills), a true vapor barrier from closed-cell foam that keeps humid outside air out of walls and attics, structural reinforcement for roof decks and walls in hurricane-exposed assemblies, and moisture control rated for coastal and flood-zone construction. We recommend the right foam for each area — open-cell (R-3.7/in) for soundproofing and budget-conscious interior work, closed-cell (R-6.5/in) for crawl spaces, metal buildings, flood zones, and storm-exposed structures.

- Website: https://sprayfoaminsulationmiami.com
- Phone: (305) 123-4567
- Email: info@sprayfoaminsulationmiami.com
- Free estimates · Same-day response · SPFA-certified crews · Licensed, bonded & insured · Serving Miami since 2008
